title: How to Build a Business Using AI: From Idea to Launch in One Day
summary: A video demonstrating Rocket 1.0's ability to maintain context across AI workflows for rapid business ideation and MVP creation. The video tests whether Rocket solves the problem of losing context when switching between tools like Perplexity, Claude, Cursor, and spreadsheets.
writeup: The video walks through using Rocket 1.0 to take a business from idea to a launched MVP in a single day, focusing on whether the tool can hold context steady across an AI workflow. It tests a specific pain point: context loss when work moves between separate tools such as Perplexity, Claude, Cursor, and spreadsheets. The takeaway centers on Rocket's claim to maintain context continuity through ideation and MVP development rather than forcing manual handoffs between disconnected apps.
